description: A tiny O-lang computer spaceman who carries many runtimes in one friendly local machine.

rows.purpose: calm resting, breathing, and blinking loop
waiting for approval, help, or user input

pet_notes: Cute compact nonhuman computer robot spaceman; cream ceramic helmet-screen with uppercase O and tiny expression-tree motif, central OValue core with eight ports, Catppuccin cream lavender mauve teal palette, clean friendly local-first design, no animal traits.
style_notes: Crisp handcrafted 32-bit pixel art, strong silhouette, limited Catppuccin palette, no antialiasing, no gradients, readable at 192x208, preserve the O-lang computer-spaceman identity.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `pixel`: Pixel-art-adjacent digital mascot with a chunky silhouette, simple dark outline, limited palette, flat cel shading, and visible stepped edges. User style notes: Crisp handcrafted 32-bit pixel art, strong silhouette, limited Catppuccin palette, no antialiasing, no gradients, readable at 192x208, preserve the O-lang computer-spaceman identity..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
